title: OpenZoo TTS mod released
author: gaichu
excerpt: Play OpenZoo and MetaZoo for free on Tabletop Simulator.
body_html:
You can now play OpenZoo on {link:https://store.steampowered.com/app/286160/Tabletop_Simulator/|Tabletop Simulator}. The mod includes every OpenZoo card plus over 1,000 MetaZoo cards from the original print run.

What's included

OpenZoo

  • Legacy (36 cards)
  • Promo 2025 (3 cards)

MetaZoo

  • Cryptid Nation 2nd Edition (189 cards)
  • Nightfall (193 cards)
  • Wilderness (200 cards)
  • UFO (193 cards)
  • Seance (230 cards)

Utilities

Card Sleever ~ A panel for changing card back images. Place a deck on the panel, enter a URL or use a reference card, and click "Sleeve it!" to apply a uniform card back to all cards.

How to play

  1. Install {link:https://store.steampowered.com/app/286160/Tabletop_Simulator/|Tabletop Simulator} on Steam
  2. Subscribe to the {link:https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3653472444|OpenZoo mod} on Steam Workshop
  3. Launch TTS and load the mod from your Workshop subscriptions

Card images load directly from the Gaichu CDN, so you'll always have the latest artwork.

See you at the table, casters.

title: eBay price tracking
author: gaichu
excerpt: Sold price tracking for WrennyMoo and After Skool Hobby cards.
body_html:
You can now see eBay sold price tracking for {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/wm|WrennyMoo} and {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/ash|After Skool Hobby} cards.

Set pages ~ Browse wm or ash and you'll see average sold prices on each card.

Sales panel ~ Card detail pages now show a sales panel with:

  • Number of recent sales
  • Lowest/highest sold price
  • 90-day rolling average

The panel includes a link to eBay sold listings for that card.

Weekly price sync ~ A scheduled job runs every Monday at 8 AM UTC and fetches completed eBay sales using the {link:https://github.com/colindaniels/eBay-sold-items-documentation|eBay Sold Items API}.

Search queries ~ Each card is searched using:

  • Keywords: Series name + card name, with spelling variants like:
{code}("wrenny moo",wrennymoo) Pidgey{/code}
  • Excluded keywords: lot, bundle, complete, etc.

90-day rolling average ~ Each sync merges new sales with existing data, deduplicates by eBay listing ID, and filters out sales older than 90 days. Price stats are recalculated from this rolling window.

title: Gaichu database API
author: gaichu
excerpt: Public REST API for accessing the Gaichu card database.
body_html:
As requested by {link:https://www.metazoocryptids.com/|MetaZoo Cryptids}, the Gaichu API is now publicly available!

  • Search cards by name, type, rarity, or illustrator
  • Browse all series: After Skool Hobby, Disgruntled Games, MetaZoo, OpenZoo, WrennyMoo
  • Get card images, stats, and effects
  • Multi-language support: English and Japanese text (WrennyMoo)
  • Average sold prices from eBay (WrennyMoo and After Skool Hobby)

Quick start

Fetch all OpenZoo Legacy cards:

{code}curl "https://us-central1-gaichu-fe55f.cloudfunctions.net/api/v1/cards?series=oz&set=legacy"{/code}

Search for any card by name:

{code}curl "https://us-central1-gaichu-fe55f.cloudfunctions.net/api/v1/cards/search?q=mothman"{/code}

Available endpoints

Cards

  • GET /v1/cards - List cards with filtering and pagination
  • GET /v1/cards/:id - Get a single card
  • GET /v1/cards/search?q= - Search by name or effect

Series & Sets

  • GET /v1/series - List all series
  • GET /v1/series/:shortName/cards - Get all cards in a series
  • GET /v1/sets/:id/cards - Get all cards in a set

Other

  • GET /v1/illustrators - List all illustrators
  • GET /v1/rarity - List rarity types
  • GET /v1/stats - Database statistics

The /v1/cards endpoint supports these filters:

  • series - ash, disgruntled, mz, oz, wm
  • set, rarity, type, illustrator
  • page & limit - Max 100 per page

Full documentation is available on {link:https://github.com/Gaichuuu/gaichu-tcg-database/blob/main/gaichu-api/README.md|GitHub}.

title: Gaichu news service is live
author: gaichu
excerpt: We've created a safe space right here for your (probably) trusted news.
body_html:
We've heard you. You're tired of digging through discord dungeons for salacious scraps of gossip. Fun sometimes, like watching Canadian casters pass gas in the dead of night. Butt not the best way to get facts. So we've created a safe space right here for your (probably) trusted Gaichu news.

Look forward to updates on various bootleg tcgs in our database. And plenty of investigative reporting. For this, we use the scam-o-meter:

Sus 🚩🚩
Typical grifter grifting.

Sus 🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩
Several rule or law violations.

Sus 🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩🚩
Millions of dollars missing.

That's all folks. See you in the salt mines.

title: How to get your OpenZoo Xmas promo
author: gaichu
excerpt: We're running a fun holiday OpenZoo promotion all December.
body_html:
We're running a fun holiday OpenZoo promotion all December. Here's how to get your free Christmas Waheela promo card.

{img:02-4.png|OpenZoo Xmas Promo}1. Send a holiday card to the Gaichu PO box anytime in December 2025. If it arrives a little late, that's fine.

2. Include your name and mailing address. I'll use this to send your promo card.

3. You're done.

Mail your holiday cards to:

  • Gaichu
  • 26400 NE Valley St #643
  • Duvall, WA
{img:02-5.jpg|Gaichu Holiday Promo Printing}

All promo cards are printed and cut at Gaichu HQ (Gaiyaya). Expect a few rare variants to sneak in... including playtester and sample cards. Have you been a good boy this year?

See {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/oz/sets/promo25/card/3_christmas-waheela|Christmas Waheela} on the OpenZoo database.

{youtube:jrRxafAnx0c}{youtube:0lfVWBPNew8}

title: OpenZoo Legacy is here
author: gaichu
excerpt: Print at home or order the full playset from Game Crafter.
body_html:
Casters, the wait is over. Legacy is available now, and you have several options to play.

Print for free: Visit the {link:https://gaichu.com/cards/oz/sets/legacy|Legacy set page} and click the "Print" button to open the PDF. You can print the entire set at home.

Print on demand: Order a Legacy deck from {link:https://www.thegamecrafter.com/games/openzoo-legacy|Game Crafter} for $15.99. The deck includes the full 85-card playset. Production times can vary, so expect it to take a few weeks.

{img:03-1.jpg}{youtube:wbM2S0FvOKg}
